emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Take message, call back next business day

non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect name, callback number, purpose. Route to Ben via call transfer if available. Otherwise take message for next business day callback.
integration_constraints: Do not proactively mention pricing - only if customer specifically asks
after_hours_flow_summary: No emergency dispatch for general public. Take message and confirm callback next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, understand purpose, collect name and callback number, attempt transfer to Ben or take detailed message.
questions_or_unknowns: Ben's direct transfer number not yet confirmed (second phone pending)
Exact emergency definition not discussed in demo
After-hours exception client details not yet captured (to be confirmed at onboarding)
notes: Demo call focused on product value. Ben is sole call handler. Uses Android phone with conditional forwarding. Pricing: service call fee and hourly rate discussed but not for proactive mention. After-hours exception exists but details deferred to onboarding.
